item.title:
With my @anduriltech-style see-through-wall vision I can find enemies in building
And then launch m...
item.description:
With my @anduriltech-style see-through-wall vision I can find enemies in building
And then launch my drone to neutralize them!
https://t.co/jtocKZuIiE https://t.co/oUO1ePtKX3
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 223
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: If you're currently subscribed to any tiers including Free, you can stay on your current plan, or up...
item.description:
If you're currently subscribed to any tiers including Free, you can stay on your current plan, or upgrade to receive bonus credits.
If you're already on Plus ($20) or Super ($100, formerly Max), you'll receive bonus credits when your subscription renews.
--- @NousResearch | ❤️ 11 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 687
item.author: @NousResearch

item.title:
New subscription tiers are live on Nous Portal
→ Plus ($20) → Super ($100) → Ultra ($200)
Bonus cr...
item.description:
New subscription tiers are live on Nous Portal
→ Plus ($20) → Super ($100) → Ultra ($200)
Bonus credits on signups, upgrades, and renewals: +$2 on Plus / +$10 on Super / +$20 on Ultra
All tiers include access to: → 300+ models → Bundled tool usage
https://t.co/R6H1nIpuzO https://t.co/gy5L3QFNcE
--- @NousResearch | ❤️ 78 | 🔁 6 | 💬 14 | 👁 2671
item.author: @NousResearch

item.title: RT @dingyi: 就是前不久那个 Sky 团队，联合创始人 Ari Weinstein 和 Conrad Kramer 是著名 iOS 自动化应用 Workflow（Shortcuts 前身） ...
item.description:
RT @dingyi: 就是前不久那个 Sky 团队，联合创始人 Ari Weinstein 和 Conrad Kramer 是著名 iOS 自动化应用 Workflow（Shortcuts 前身） 的开发者。当时 Sky 刚发布一个 demo 就让全网高潮了。 https:/…
--- @dotey | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 3 | 💬 0 | 👁 1
item.author: @dotey

item.title: RT @dillonrolnick: @hecubian_devil damn, someone leaked our hermes agent update
item.author: @NousResearch

item.title: Claude 降智的原因终于找到了 是SDK 的 harness 出了问题 所有基于 claude SDK 的 agent 受到了影响 官方已经发了更新解决 这查了得一个月吧… 真不容易，关键时刻还...
item.description:
Claude 降智的原因终于找到了 是SDK 的 harness 出了问题 所有基于 claude SDK 的 agent 受到了影响 官方已经发了更新解决 这查了得一个月吧… 真不容易，关键时刻还得靠人类
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 1625
item.author: @oran_ge
